---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear description of what you'd like to see.

## Motivation
Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Dwarf Fortress Context
How does this relate to DF gameplay? Is it based on a specific game mechanic or player experience?

## Suggested Implementation
If you have ideas on how this could work, describe them here. Optional.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.
